citation_and_locator: Lui, Pun Ho. 2026. The associative plural in Cantonese. Language and Linguistics 27(2). DOI 10.1075/lali.00256.lui; John Benjamins publisher abstract and article outline
what_it_supports: Direct focal-referent + `佢哋` construction and `小明佢哋` example; associates remain recoverable but covert; free `佢哋` and rarer/odd bound `哋`; complex and coordinated focal referents; distinction from conjunctive coordination and inclusory constructions; corpus, internet, and native-judgment methods; stated discourse uses.
limit: Abstract-level verification does not expose the complete example inventory, participant/sample details, judgment or statistical results, negative cases, or full nominal, semantic, regional, register, and prosodic restrictions.
